name: @aily-project/lib-dfrobot-sfa40
nickname_zh_cn: SFA40 甲醛温湿度传感器
nickname_zh_hk: SFA40 甲醛溫濕度感測器
author: Vonweller
description: SFA40 是 I2C 甲醛、温度和湿度传感器，可读取 HCHO、相对湿度、摄氏/华氏温度，并返回传感器预热与通信状态。
description_zh_cn: SFA40 是 I2C 甲醛、温度和湿度传感器，可读取 HCHO、相对湿度、摄氏/华氏温度，并返回传感器预热与通信状态。
description_en: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot SFA40 I2C formaldehyde, temperature, and humidity sensor, supporting HCHO, relative humidity, Celsius/Fahrenheit temperature, and measurement status readings.
description_zh_hk: SFA40 是 I2C 甲醛、溫度和濕度感測器，可讀取 HCHO、相對濕度、攝氏/華氏溫度，並返回感測器預熱與通訊狀態。
description_ja: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot SFA40 I2C formaldehyde, temperature, and humidity sensor, supporting HCHO, relative humidity, Celsius/Fahrenheit temperature, and measurement status readings.
description_ko: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot SFA40 I2C formaldehyde, temperature, and humidity sensor, supporting HCHO, relative humidity, Celsius/Fahrenheit temperature, and measurement status readings.
